name: agentsmd
description: CODEX-CODING-SPEC — global Codex workflow and evidence guidance, with native hooks for selected safety/report checks and rule-specific opportunity telemetry. Installs independently of oh-my-codex.

interface.shortDescription: A coding-discipline spec with bounded native checks and opportunity telemetry
interface.longDescription: agentsmd combines a global SPINE/evidence spec with bounded native hooks. Hooks block selected dangerous shell, secret-commit, vocabulary, and known-red CI patterns; Stop observers report detectable structure issues. Telemetry records rule-specific opportunities and outcomes for operator review. Manifest-backed ownership keeps standalone lifecycle changes scoped to agentsmd artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Review this coding task against the repository's AGENTS.md instructions and report evidence-backed findings.
